claims.detail: Simulator topology claim: App Service sits behind Front Door with managed TLS.

findings.description: HTTPS terminates at Azure Front Door with health probes before App Service slots.
findings.recommendation: Keep WAF managed rules enabled and validate origin certificates yearly.

findings.description: Key Vault references supply connection strings; RBAC limits secret access to the web app identity.
findings.recommendation: Rotate secrets on a schedule and alert on abnormal Key Vault access patterns.
